title: Partial STS Array
description: Array of partial Symbolic Transition Systems (STS), one per Gherkin scenario. Produced by the pickles-translator as '<timestamp>_<basename>.json'. Each element describes the states, gates, guards, and switches derived from a single Given/When/Then scenario.

variableDefinition.title: Variable Definition
variableDefinition.description: Type annotation and finite domain for a single STS variable.

type.description: Data type of the variable. 'decimal' maps to floating-point numbers.

range.description: Finite ordered list of allowed values. Element JSON type must be consistent with 'type': string→string, integer/decimal→number, boolean→boolean.

gate.title: Gate
gate.description: An input or output gate with a natural-language label and a list of parameters it communicates.

text.description: Natural-language label extracted from the Gherkin 'When' (input) or 'Then' (output) step.

shortname.description: Optional short identifier for the gate, for display purposes.

parameters.description: Ordered list of parameter IDs communicated by this gate. Each ID must be a key in the parent STS 'parameters' map. May be empty.

guardExpr.title: Guard Expression
guardExpr.description: A boolean/arithmetic expression node: a variable reference or literal leaf, or a nested operator node.

oneOf.description: Set literal, used as the rhs of 'in' / 'not in'.

assignment.title: Assignment
assignment.description: A single variable update executed atomically when a switch fires.

target.description: Target variable ID. Must be a base-name key from the parent STS 'locationVariables' map (non-expanded, e.g. 'faulty-detectors', not 'faulty-detectors[0].lane').

expression.description: Right-hand side expression. Typically the corresponding parameter ID (e.g. 'faulty-detectors_p'), but may be a computed expression.

switch.title: Switch
switch.description: A labelled transition between two locations. Fires when the gate is triggered and the guard holds; executes the assignments on firing.

init_loc.description: Source location ID. Must appear in the parent STS 'locations' array.

gate.description: ID of the triggering gate. Must be a key in the parent STS 'inputGates' or 'outputGates' map.

guard.description: ID of the single guard from the parent STS 'guards' map that must hold for this switch to fire.

assignments.description: Ordered list of assignment IDs from the parent STS 'assignments' map, executed when the switch fires. May be empty.

end_loc.description: Target location ID. Must appear in the parent STS 'locations' array.

sts.title: STS
sts.description: A single Symbolic Transition System derived from one Gherkin scenario.

id.description: Unique STS identifier. Format: 'sts_NNN' where NNN is a zero-padded 3-digit integer (e.g. 'sts_001').

description.description: Human-readable scenario label, typically prefixed with the scenario number (e.g. '01: faulty detectors outside the critical section').

initial_state.description: True when this scenario's Given step contains an INITCOND predicate, marking it as a contributor to the system initial state.

initial_location.description: The unique starting location for this STS. Always 'L0_<N>' where N is the numeric part of 'id' (e.g. 'L0_1' for 'sts_001').

gate_id_type.description: JSON type used for gate IDs.

location_id_type.description: JSON type used for location IDs.

initialValuation.description: Optional initial value per location variable.

locationVariables.description: All state variables in the system, keyed by variable ID. Primitive and boolean variables use their base name. Array-of-struct variables are expanded: 'arrayName[i].attrName' is a separate entry for each element index i and attribute name. Primitive arrays use 'arrayName[i]'.

parameters.description: Gate parameters derived from location variables: one parameter per location variable, keyed by the variable ID suffixed with '_p' (e.g. 'availability_p' for variable 'availability'). Same type and range as the source variable.

attributes.description: Always empty: struct attribute types are inferable from the expanded 'locationVariables' keys (e.g. 'arr[0].attr').

locations.description: Ordered list of all location IDs in this STS. For a scenario with M 'When' steps and N 'Then' steps there are M+N+1 locations: 'L0_<id>', 'L1_<id>', ..., 'L<M+N>_<id>'.

inputGates.description: Input gates derived from Gherkin 'When' steps, keyed by gate ID. Format: 'In<sts_num>_<step_num>' (e.g. 'In1_1' = first When of sts_001).

outputGates.description: Output gates derived from Gherkin 'Then' steps, keyed by gate ID. Format: 'Out<sts_num>_<step_num>' (e.g. 'Out1_1' = first Then of sts_001).

guards.description: Named guard expression trees keyed by guard ID ('G1', 'G2', ...). Guards are generated from Given, When, and Then step conditions. Each STS resets the counter from G1.

assignments.description: Named variable assignments keyed by assignment ID ('A1', 'A2', ...). Each STS resets the counter from A1.

switches.description: Labelled transitions keyed by switch ID ('r_1', 'r_2', ...). One switch is generated per When step and one per Then step, in scenario order.
